format: Markdown dossier, 7 sections, citations on every non-obvious claim
notes: Charlotte A. Crutchfield, Esq. — D19 House incumbent (Dem) seeking 3rd term as part of slate with Sen. Ben Kramer and Del. Vaughn Stewart. Born Dec 8, 1963 Chicago; Howard '86 (Econ); BC Law '89 (JD); MD Bar 1991, GA Bar 1993; Asst State's Attorney MoCo 1991-92; Gulfstream Aerospace staff counsel 1993-95 then Associate General [Counsel] 1996-2002; General Dynamics Advanced Information Systems Sr. Mgr Employee Relations 2002-06; MoCo Dem Central Committee 2010-14; Merit System Protection Bd 2014-17 (chair 2016-17); 2014 lost House primary 4th/15.7%; 2018 won House primary 2nd/17.6%; sworn 1/9/2019; House Judiciary 2019-25 (chair Family & Juv Law subcomm 2021-25); lead sponsor HB 147 (Love Is No Defense to Sexual Crimes) 2021 (House 125-4 then died after Senate amendments) and 2022 (House 125-6, Senate 46-0, enacted); Deputy Majority Whip 2024-; moved to Govt/Labor/Elections 2026- chairing Corrections Subcommittee. Widow, 2 children. Member Delta Sigma Theta MoCo Alumnae. One of first Black women elected to MoCo House delegation (with Wilkins, Queen). 8 enumerated open questions including Chicago HS, Wootton/sanctuary public statements, fiscal-bill roll-call posture, 2026 campaign-finance posture.
